description: Structured data of dream phenomena for programmatic access

categories.name: Sensory Distortions
categories.description: Alterations to normal sensory experience in dreams

phenomena.name: Blurry or Unstable Vision
phenomena.description: Dream visuals unfocused or prone to sudden change; text blurs or letters rearrange

phenomena.name: Unstable Text and Clocks
phenomena.description: Written words and numbers unreliable; clock time changes between glances

phenomena.name: Heavy or Slow Motion Body
phenomena.description: Physical actions impeded; running in slow motion as through invisible barrier

phenomena.name: Impaired Voice
phenomena.description: Unable to speak or scream; only whisper or no sound; powerlessness in nightmare

phenomena.name: Hyper-Vivid Dreams
phenomena.description: More vivid than waking reality — extreme clarity, neon saturation

phenomena.name: Phantom Sounds
phenomena.description: Voices, music, explosions without source

phenomena.name: Physical Sensations
phenomena.description: Touch, temperature, pain, pleasure experienced in dreams

categories.name: Spatial & Temporal Anomalies
categories.description: Violations of normal space and time in dreams

phenomena.name: Shifting Landscapes
phenomena.description: Settings that defy logic, surreal or non-Euclidean environments

phenomena.name: Defiance of Physics
phenomena.description: Gravity malleable; flying, floating, objects behaving strangely

phenomena.name: Time Distortions
phenomena.description: Dream feels like hours; entire lifetimes in short nap; shuffled sequences

phenomena.name: Scene Merging and Loops
phenomena.description: Spatial continuity broken; rooms loop back; endless hallways

phenomena.name: Infinite Interiors
phenomena.description: Buildings containing impossible numbers of rooms continuing forever

phenomena.name: Gravity Inversion
phenomena.description: Full sky-to-ground inversion, walls rotating upward becoming sky

phenomena.name: Scale Alternation
phenomena.description: Dreamer alternates between giant-scale and microscopic perspectives

categories.name: Identity Shifts
categories.description: Transformations of self and identity in dreams

phenomena.name: Becoming Someone Else
phenomena.description: Dreamer inhabits body or perspective of another person or creature

phenomena.name: Multiple Simultaneous Selves
phenomena.description: Experiencing awareness in two or more dream bodies at same time

phenomena.name: Identity Bleed
phenomena.description: Waking-life personality intruding into dream behavior

phenomena.name: Avatar Migration
phenomena.description: Jumping into viewpoint of any dream character deliberately

phenomena.name: Self Copies
phenomena.description: Encountering duplicates of yourself interacting independently

categories.name: Narrative Glitches
categories.description: Breaks and anomalies in dream narrative logic

phenomena.name: Abrupt Scene Changes
phenomena.description: Without buildup, setting and situation change instantaneously

phenomena.name: Plot Holes Made Physical
phenomena.description: Narrative logic gaps becoming spatial or temporal anomalies

phenomena.name: Dream-Within-Dream
phenomena.description: False awakenings, nested realities

phenomena.name: Meta-Awareness
phenomena.description: Recognizing the dream as scene or game, characters acknowledging dreamer

categories.name: Emotional Patterns
categories.description: Recurring emotional dynamics in dream states

phenomena.name: Emotional Incongruence
phenomena.description: Emotions not corresponding logically to events — euphoria during disaster

phenomena.name: Overwhelming Emotional Surges
phenomena.description: Sudden overwhelming surges not tied to narrative

phenomena.name: Collective Mirroring
phenomena.description: All dream characters mirroring dreamer's emotional state simultaneously

phenomena.name: Mood-Driven Scene Changes
phenomena.description: Scene changes initiated entirely by change in mood

phenomena.name: Lucid Dreaming
phenomena.description: Full awareness that one is dreaming while inside the dream

phenomena.name: Sleep Paralysis
phenomena.description: Awakening with body immobilized; REM sleep with waking consciousness

phenomena.name: Precognitive Dreams
phenomena.description: Dreams appearing to predict future events

phenomena.name: Shared Dreams
phenomena.description: Multiple people reporting same dream content

phenomena.name: Out-of-Body Experience
phenomena.description: Sensation of consciousness leaving the physical body

phenomena.name: Hypnagogic Hallucinations
phenomena.description: Vivid images and sensations at sleep onset
